site.name: BadgerNet 4.0
site.tagline: Where UW–Madison students and alumni go — data-driven views (in progress).

methodology_blurb: This app loads static JSON from /data. Seven top-level tabs including Notable alumni. Industry supports a major filter (see /data/majors/). Career flow uses sankey aggregates; top employers use bar charts. Notable list requires source_url per row (Wikidata, news, reviewed LinkedIn).
